## Type
- [ ] feat  - [ ] fix  - [ ] docs  - [ ] refactor  - [ ] test  - [ ] chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commit title
- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit / widget / golden / worker)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` + `flutter test` pass (app)
- [ ] `ruff` + `black` + `mypy` + `pytest` pass (worker)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (Unreleased / Decision Log / Attempts)
- [ ] No secrets committed
